title: International Arrivals FIS Expansion
description: MAC directed expansion of Federal Inspection Services area by 4200 sqft to accommodate new customs and agricultural inspection stations required by CBP. Includes additional FIS casework

title: Airfield Pavement Unforeseen Conditions
description: Differing site conditions discovered during excavation at Gate Area C hardstand. Unsuitable soils encountered 3 feet below design subgrade elevation requiring over-excavation and select backfill of approximately 4800 CY.

title: Enhanced Security Camera Infrastructure
description: TSA directed additional conduit and rough-in for 148 security cameras beyond original design scope. Includes additional pathways
amount: and termination panels at Security Operations Center.

title: Runway 17 Blast Pad Enlargement
description: FAA directed enlargement of Runway 17 blast pad from 150x400 ft to 150x500 ft based on updated aircraft classification. Additional PCC paving
